project.name: DDLSim-Lab
project.tagline: Autonomous Testbed for Deterministic Networking & eBPF Telemetry
project.description: An international research initiative building a specialized testbed for high-fidelity deterministic networking. DDLSim-Lab leverages eBPF/XDP to analyze and mitigate microsecond-level jitter in global Edge-Cloud continuums.

funding_goals.title: DDLSim-Lab Private Testbed Construction
funding_goals.description: Procurement of specialized high-performance bare-metal hardware and network equipment to establish a dedicated project testbed for local benchmarking.

funding_goals.title: International Testbed Integration & Egress
funding_goals.description: Operational costs for bridging DDLSim-Lab with global research infrastructures (SPHERE, R2lab, GWDG) and managing high-bandwidth telemetry data synchronization.

roadmap.milestone: Full Integration with European & US Testbeds
